Why join the Industry Council

Membership privileges

Invite-only network of working GCC leaders, with concrete benefits that compound over time. No vendor pitches, no commercial obligations — just access to the people, intelligence and platforms that move the needle.

01 / 05
A peer-to-peer active GCC leadership network

Direct access to working GCC leaders across Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Mumbai, Delhi NCR and beyond. Every member is in full-time employment running a real GCC — no vendors, no consultants, no inactive members. Conversations stay candid because the people in the room have skin in the game.

Closed · Curated · Current
02 / 05
Complimentary research & reports

Free access to every research insight, whitepaper and report GCCPROs publishes — benchmarking, talent, location strategy, generation models. Members receive new reports first.

03 / 05
₹5,000 annual database credits

Search the verified GCC database with annual credits worth ₹5,000 on us — auto-refreshed each year your membership is active.

04 / 05
Industry benchmarking support

Calibrate your GCC against peer centres — headcount, leadership maturity, domain depth, location mix, generation models. Confidential, one-on-one analyst support.

05 / 05
Speaking & engagement opportunities

Exclusive invitations to speak, moderate or panelist at GCCPROs summits, podcasts, city roundtables and Council sessions throughout the year.
